creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: Can you attach net/mpich/work/mpich-3.2/src/pm/hydra/config.log?  There was a problem with devel/hwloc on FreeBSD 11.1 that has been fixed.  MPICH is supposed to use libhwloc from that port but it also contains an embedded copy.  Maybe for some reason it's using that in your case.
